changes: Eclipse reworked: now an active button (2 charges, 30s CD) instead of passive trigger
Apex Talents added: Ascendant Eclipses (4 ranks, Eclipse bolts, crit DoT scaling)
Mastery simplified: flat damage increase, no longer interacts with Moonfire/Sunfire
Starlord: now 20s duration, no longer cancellable
Stellar Flare REMOVED
Waning Twilight REMOVED
Warrior of Elune REMOVED
Umbral Inspiration REMOVED
Astronomical Impact REMOVED
Nature's Vigil replaced by Gift of the Wild
Heart of the Wild reworked: form-dependent 2-min cooldown
Orbit Breaker: Full Moon every 25 Shooting Stars (was 30)
Convoke the Spirits: now prefers Starsurge or Full Moon on current target
Many class tree talents converted to 1-point talents
3 new Hero Talent nodes per tree (level 90)
New tier set: Luminous Bloom (Shooting Stars synergy)
New raids: Manaforge Omega, Windrunner Spire, Midnight Falls
New M+ dungeons: Windrunner Spire, Murder Row, Den of Nalorakk, Maisara Caverns
Level cap raised to 90
Balance Druid received 20% flat damage increase in Season 1 tuning pass
4pc tier set Shooting Star proc chance reduced from 40% to 30%
Lunar Calling damage buff increased to 160%
Final TWW patch before Midnight
Power of Goldrinn increased by 100%
Wrath damage increased by 30%
Starsurge damage increased by 5%
